message:
fix: add timeout to NudgeSession/NudgePane per-session locks (gt-z4drj)

Replace sync.Mutex with channel-based semaphore for per-session nudge
serialization. If a nudge hangs (e.g., tmux becomes unresponsive), the
lock is now released after 30s instead of being held forever, preventing
permanent blocking of all future nudges to that session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
